Acorus calamus, also known as Calamus or Sweet Flag, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the Acorus genus. The health benefits of Acorus calamus include its anti-inflammatory, anti-bacterial, and anti-fungal properties, which can help in relieving digestive issues, reducing stress, and promoting overall well-being. The bioactive constituents of Acorus calamus include asarone, limonene, and beta-eudesmol, among others, which contribute to its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Acorus calamus include teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which are used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
